_defaults.dressCode: Modest traditional dress recommended. Follow site-specific rules at the entrance.
_defaults.photography: Usually restricted inside sanctum or prayer areas. Check local signage before taking photos.

temples.name: Tawang Monastery
temples.description: A 400-year-old Buddhist monastery at Tawang, described by the district administration as one of India's oldest and largest monasteries.

temples.name: Golden Pagoda
temples.description: A notable Theravada Buddhist pagoda in Namsai, built on a plateau overlooking the foothills of the eastern Himalaya.

temples.name: Malinithan Temple Ruins
temples.location: Likabali, Lower Siang District, Arunachal Pradesh
temples.description: An archaeological temple site at Likabali associated with the worship of Goddess Malini and listed among Arunachal Pradesh's spiritual heritage sites.

temples.name: Parshuram Kund
temples.location: Near Wakro, Lohit District, Arunachal Pradesh
temples.description: A major Hindu pilgrimage site on the Lohit River, especially visited during Makar Sankranti.

temples.name: Gorsam Chorten
temples.description: A historic Buddhist chorten at Zemithang, included in Arunachal Pradesh spiritual tourism references.
